<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get all Wire In Requests for a company"}
>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_uuid}/wire_in_requests"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Fetches all Wire In Requests for a company.

scope: `payrolls:read`
